---
title: "Scenario Explorer"
---

```{r}
pick_path <- function(paths) {
  for (p in paths) if (file.exists(p)) return(p)
  ""
}

summary_path <- pick_path(c(
  "../../data/derived/scenario_summary.csv",
  "../data/derived/scenario_summary.csv",
  "data/derived/scenario_summary.csv"
))

if (!nzchar(summary_path)) {
  summary_path <- pick_path(c(
    "../../outputs/aggregate/results_summary.csv",
    "../outputs/aggregate/results_summary.csv",
    "outputs/aggregate/results_summary.csv"
  ))
}

if (!nzchar(summary_path)) stop("No scenario summary or aggregate summary CSV available.")

df <- utils::read.csv(summary_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
if (!("scenario_id" %in% names(df))) df$scenario_id <- "AGGREGATE"
if (!("metric" %in% names(df))) stop("Summary CSV missing metric column.")
if (!("powertrain" %in% names(df))) df$powertrain <- "unknown"
if (!("trailer_type" %in% names(df))) df$trailer_type <- "unknown"
if (!("variant_id" %in% names(df))) df$variant_id <- df$scenario_id

for (nm in c("mean", "var", "p05", "p50", "p95")) {
  if (!(nm %in% names(df))) df[[nm]] <- NA_real_
}
df <- df[order(df$scenario_id, df$powertrain, df$trailer_type, df$metric), c("scenario_id", "variant_id", "powertrain", "trailer_type", "metric", "mean", "var", "p05", "p50", "p95"), drop = FALSE]

scenario_vals <- unique(df$scenario_id)
power_vals <- unique(df$powertrain)
trailer_vals <- unique(df$trailer_type)
scenario_options <- paste(sprintf("<option value='%s'>%s</option>", scenario_vals, scenario_vals), collapse = "")
power_options <- paste(sprintf("<option value='%s'>%s</option>", power_vals, power_vals), collapse = "")
trailer_options <- paste(sprintf("<option value='%s'>%s</option>", trailer_vals, trailer_vals), collapse = "")

row_html <- apply(df, 1, function(r) {
  sprintf(
    "<tr data-scenario='%s' data-power='%s' data-trailer='%s'><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%s</td><td>%.6g</td><td>%.6g</td><td>%.6g</td><td>%.6g</td><td>%.6g</td></tr>",
    r[["scenario_id"]], r[["powertrain"]], r[["trailer_type"]],
    r[["scenario_id"]], r[["variant_id"]], r[["powertrain"]], r[["metric"]],
    as.numeric(r[["mean"]]), as.numeric(r[["var"]]),
    as.numeric(r[["p05"]]), as.numeric(r[["p50"]]), as.numeric(r[["p95"]])
  )
})

cat(
  "<div style='display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:center;'>",
  "<label for='scenario-filter'><b>Scenario:</b></label> ",
  "<select id='scenario-filter'><option value='ALL'>ALL</option>", scenario_options, "</select>",
  "<label for='power-filter'><b>Powertrain:</b></label> ",
  "<select id='power-filter'><option value='ALL'>ALL</option>", power_options, "</select>",
  "<label for='trailer-filter'><b>Trailer:</b></label> ",
  "<select id='trailer-filter'><option value='ALL'>ALL</option>", trailer_options, "</select>",
  "</div>",
  "<table id='scenario-table' class='table table-striped' style='margin-top:12px;'>",
  "<thead><tr><th>Scenario</th><th>Variant</th><th>Powertrain</th><th>Metric</th><th>Mean</th><th>Var</th><th>P05</th><th>P50</th><th>P95</th></tr></thead>",
  "<tbody>", paste(row_html, collapse = "\n"), "</tbody></table>",
  "<script>",
  "const sSel=document.getElementById('scenario-filter');",
  "const pSel=document.getElementById('power-filter');",
  "const tSel=document.getElementById('trailer-filter');",
  "const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll('#scenario-table tbody tr')];",
  "function applyFilters(){",
  " const s=sSel.value, p=pSel.value, t=tSel.value;",
  " rows.forEach(r=>{",
  "   const keepS=(s==='ALL'||r.dataset.scenario===s);",
  "   const keepP=(p==='ALL'||r.dataset.power===p);",
  "   const keepT=(t==='ALL'||r.dataset.trailer===t);",
  "   r.style.display=(keepS&&keepP&&keepT)?'':'none';",
  " });",
  "}",
  "sSel.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);",
  "pSel.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);",
  "tSel.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);",
  "applyFilters();",
  "</script>",
  sep = ""
)
```

```{r}
plot_df <- subset(df, metric %in% c("gco2_dry", "gco2_reefer", "diff_gco2", "ratio"))
if (nrow(plot_df) > 0) {
  old_par <- par(mar = c(8, 4, 2, 1))
  on.exit(par(old_par), add = TRUE)
  labels <- paste(plot_df$scenario_id, plot_df$metric, sep = " | ")
  barplot(plot_df$mean, names.arg = labels, las = 2, cex.names = 0.7, col = "#4C78A8", ylab = "Mean")
}
```
